response.step_by_step_log: The video features a performance of the song 'キズナ♡スペシャリティ' (Kizuna♡Specialty) by Hololive VTubers. The song title appears in the top-left corner as 'キズナ♡スペシャリティ'. The original song is from 'Delicious Party Pretty Cure'. The performer in the video is a group of Hololive VTubers. I used the search string '"キズナスペシャリティ" hololive Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 3D animated performance video featuring Hololive VTubers singing a cover of 'Kizuna♡Specialty' from Delicious Party Pretty Cure, followed by a short comedic skit involving the characters.

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform a song on a 3D stage with on-screen lyrics. Song title 'キズナ♡スペシャリティ' is shown in top-left.
scenes.song_title: キズナ♡スペシャリティ (Kizuna♡Specialty)
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive VTubers (Yukihana Lamy, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、生まれてから今日までの間
どれくらいのごはんで
わたし達はできてるかな
毎日ありがとう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, from the day we were born until today,
I wonder how much food
we're made of.
Thank you for every day.
